description: GET /v1/subscriptions/catalog — subscription catalog for pro tier

spot_score.name: Spot Score
spot_score.description: Aggregated spot market signal. Combines price momentum, volume, trend, and overextension. Negative = bearish, positive = bullish.

spot_decision.name: Spot Go/No-Go
spot_decision.description: Spot market trading signal. GO = bullish indicators aligned, NO-GO = bearish, STARTER = mixed signals.

confidence.name: Signal Agreement
confidence.description: How strongly indicators agree with each other, averaged across spot and perps. Higher = more indicators pointing the same direction.
